name: Arrabbiata-Style Spagheti
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chitterlings mixed with pork (ask butcher)
10 Shelled walnuts (Puree with a little oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and chop chitterlings.
2. Heat olive oil in a pan.
3. Add the chopped chitterlings and pork (ask butcher) to the pan with garlic, paprika, and pepper.
4. Fry until the chitterlings are cooked through, about 5 minutes.
5. Blanche raisins and add them to the pan along with walnut puree.
6. Stir in white wine.
7. Cook for a few more minutes until everything is well combined.
8. Serve hot over cooked spaghetti.
9. Top with grated cheese.
